document.source_title: Why Punjab Kings don't look like the same team that started IPL 2026: Home venue change, poor fielding or bad luck

claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings have lost five completed matches in a row.
claims.evidence_text: Punjab have lost five completed matches in a row, and the defeats have not followed one simple pattern.

claims.claim_text: Punjab's powerplay average has fallen significantly.
claims.evidence_text: In the last five matches, Punjab’s powerplay average has fallen to 56.8.

claims.claim_text: Punjab's death bowling has become more expensive.
claims.evidence_text: In the last five, they have conceded 63.2 runs per match at the death at an economy of 13.64.

metrics.name: Average runs scored in powerplay
metrics.evidence_text: In the last five matches, Punjab’s powerplay average has fallen to 56.8.

metrics.name: Runs conceded at death
metrics.evidence_text: In the last five, they have conceded 63.2 runs per match at the death at an economy of 13.64.
